verdict_reason: Chapter 2 thesis: refuse the tactical answer, reframe at first principles. 2.44 anchors in the karma-yoga thread plus the sthita-prajña thread (the cognitive state of the seasoned operator). The engineering layer preserves the chapter's emphasis on the operator's cognitive substrate as the actual variable to watch. Verse ordering: 2.41 (precondition) → 2.42-43 (obstruction speakers and their trajectory) → 2.44 (the consequence: structural impossibility) → 2.45 (operative imperative to rise above the gunas). 2.44's place in this progression is the consequence-clause that motivates 2.45's imperative. The block builds correctly. PASS for both 10.3 and 10.4.
